title: Knowledge Accumulation & Observability

test_results.failed_reason: Pre-existing: test_daemon_status_when_not_running (real daemon is running). No regressions.

overview: Built the knowledge accumulation and observability layer — rich extraction persistence to Postgres with content-hash dedup and local file mirrors, batch URL extraction, pipeline chaining with --extract-all and --urls-only flags, unified knowledge recall across 5 tables, trace enrichment with bytes/latency metrics, and a personal analytics dashboard.

parts_completed.A_Extraction_Persistence: New extracted_documents table (16 columns) with ExtractionStore class. Auto-persists every extraction to Postgres with content-hash dedup. Local markdown mirrors at ~/.octane/extractions/<hash>.md. Migration 36A added.
parts_completed.B_Pipeline_Chaining: Enhanced search-youtube and search-arxiv with --extract-all (extract and persist all results) and --urls-only (bare URLs/IDs to stdout for piping). Removed old duplicate command definitions.
parts_completed.C_Trace_Enrichment: Added bytes_extracted and wall_ms to web_synthesis trace events in both _fetch_news() and _fetch_search(). Trace detail view shows new fields and a summary footer with total pages/KB extracted.
parts_completed.D_Unified_Recall: New octane recall command with search (queries 5 tables: extracted_documents, web_pages, research_findings, user_files, artifacts) and stats (row counts and word totals per source).
parts_completed.E_Batch_Extraction: New octane extract batch FILE command. Reads URLs from file (skips # comments and blanks), extracts sequentially with Rich progress bar, persists each to Postgres.
parts_completed.F_Extraction_Dedup: Content-hash based deduplication via store.seen() check before storing. ON CONFLICT DO UPDATE upsert on content_hash unique index.
parts_completed.G_Stats_Dashboard: New octane stats command. Queries 6 tables for counts/words, shows extraction breakdown by source_type, counts trace files and local mirror files with sizes.

new_cli_commands: octane recall search QUERY [--type TYPE] [--limit N] [-v]
new_db_tables: extracted_documents — source_type, source_url, content_hash (unique dedup key), title, author, raw_text, chunks (JSONB), total_words, total_chunks, extraction_method, reliability_score, metadata (JSONB), local_path, extracted_at
new_classes: ExtractionStore — async Postgres store for extracted_documents with upsert, dedup, search, stats, and local file mirror

trace_enrichment.display: Trace detail view shows fields inline and footer shows total pages/KB extracted
